# Copilot Instructions for RAG Evaluator

This project uses Azure DevOps. Always check to see if the Azure DevOps MCP server has a tool relevant to the user's request.

## Project Context

This is a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) evaluation platform that:
- Uses Azure services (AI Foundry, AI Search, Document Intelligence)
- Uses Supabase for database and storage
- Has a Python FastAPI backend
- Has a TypeScript React frontend

## Azure DevOps Integration

The Azure DevOps MCP server is configured and available. Use it to:
- List ADO projects
- List builds, repos, test plans
- Manage work items
- Access wikis
- Query pipelines and repositories

When working with Azure-related tasks, leverage the Azure DevOps MCP tools to gather context and information.
